emails.subject: clgf k#66547
emails.body: clgf k#66547 What's this according to Navigator, we only have this contract for 1 day on Feb 23rd? I just entered it in the ces retail sheet. MDQ 5000 and the rate is $.01? Who did this deal? The receipt points are Exxon-Chalkley, NGPL, and Tenn-Egan. The delivery point is Rayne. It looks like we nominated gas on this contract. I'm setting up this up in Sitara and on our 2000tran02.xls worksheet and I entered it in Sitara deal 223022. Jesse, this will need to be scheduled in Unify.
